patterns.error: Glob tool times out after 60s when searching recursively under home directory
patterns.resolution: Use ls via Bash or specify a more specific subdirectory

patterns.error: npm install -g fails with EACCES permission denied on WSL
patterns.resolution: Install locally in project directory and use npx to run

patterns.error: wrangler login fails because previous attempt left process on port 8976
patterns.resolution: Kill the process on the port then retry login
